Give simple feedback on this short paragraph for an A2 English learner: My name is Sara. I like study English. English is important for my future. I want be doctor.
Give simple feedback on this short paragraph for an A2 English learner: Yesterday I went to market with my sister. We buy fruits and come back home. I was happy.
Give simple feedback on this short paragraph for an A2 English learner: My school is good. I have many friend. My teacher help me learn new words.

Give feedback on this paragraph for a B1 English learner: Many students prefer online education because it is flexible. However, some students face internet problems and cannot join classes regularly.
Give feedback on this paragraph for a B1 English learner: I believe girls education is important because it helps families and communities. When girls study, they can support themselves and others.
Give feedback on this paragraph for a B1 English learner: Social media has many advantages, but it also causes distraction. Students should learn how to use it carefully.

Give detailed feedback on this paragraph for a B2 English learner: Online education can expand access for students in conflict-affected regions, but its success depends on digital access, learner motivation, and social support.
Give detailed feedback on this paragraph for a B2 English learner: Leadership is not only about authority; it is also about responsibility, listening, and creating opportunities for others.

Give detailed feedback on this paragraph for a B2 English learner: Artificial intelligence may transform education, but it should be evaluated carefully before being used as a replacement for human teachers.

Give feedback on coherence, grammar, and vocabulary in this paragraph: Climate change affects water security in many regions. Communities need early warning systems to recognize risks before they become disasters.
